# mailcow_domain_alias (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `alias_domain` (String) Alias domain name
- `target_domain` (String) Target domain name

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) is domain alias active or not
